name: kismet-capture-ti-cc-2540
title: kismet-capture-ti-cc-2540
summary: Kismet TICC2540 BTLE Sniffer capture helper
description:
Kismet TICC2540 BTLE Sniffer capture helper
Kismet is a wireless network and device detector, sniffer, wardriving tool,
and WIDS (wireless intrusion detection) framework.
.
Kismet works with Wi-Fi interfaces, Bluetooth interfaces, some SDR (software
defined radio) hardware like the RTLSDR, and other specialized capture
hardware.
.
This package contains the Kismet TICC2540 BTLE Sniffer capture helper.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use kismet_cap_ti_cc_2540 because Kismet TICC2540 BTLE Sniffer capture helper.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use kismet_cap_ti_cc_2540 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `kismet_cap_ti_cc_2540 [options] [args]` as documented upstream for kismet_cap_ti_cc_2540.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair kismet_cap_ti_cc_2540 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `kismet_cap_ti_cc_2540 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
